---
title: "Digital Marketing"
---

## 📈 Overview

This page highlights my experience in digital marketing, including SEO, paid media, social media marketing, and performance optimization.

---

## 🚀 Key Experience

### 🎓 Cal Poly Pomona — Digital Marketing Assistant
- Managed and updated 100+ website pages using Cascade CMS  
- Supported digital campaigns for college events  
- Generated **600+ qualified leads** through Google Ads and Meta Ads  

---

### 🤝 Trauma Resource Institute — Google Ads & SEO
- Managed a **$10K/month Google Ads Grant campaign**  
- Improved visibility through SEO and content optimization  
- Supported social media engagement strategies  

---

### 💼 Industry Experience

Worked across multiple industries including:
- E-commerce  
- Electronics  
- Agriculture  
- SaaS  
- Education  
- Home services  

Handled:
- SEO (on-page, off-page, technical)  
- Paid Ads (Google, Meta, LinkedIn)  
- Social media campaigns  
- Lead generation and funnel optimization  

---

## 📊 Skills & Tools

- **SEO:** Keyword research, technical SEO, link building  
- **Paid Media:** Google Ads, Meta Ads, LinkedIn Ads  
- **Analytics:** Google Analytics, Search Console, Looker Studio  
- **Optimization:** A/B testing, CRO, landing pages  
- **Tools:** SEMrush, Tag Manager, Microsoft Clarity  

---

## 🎯 Results

- Generated **600+ leads** through paid campaigns  
- Managed **₹20L+ ad budget** across platforms  
- Improved website performance and SEO rankings  
- Delivered data-driven insights for marketing decisions  

---

## 💡 Approach

I focus on combining **strategy, execution, and data analysis** to create marketing campaigns that drive measurable business results.
